title: Malice (CR90 corvette)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Youmay|the CR90 corvette|[[Malice (Imperial I-class)|the ''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer of the same name]]}}
[[File:Malice.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The ''Malice''.]]
'''''Malice''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] that formed part of the [[Corrupter Task Force]] in its hunt for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] cruiser [[Defiance/Legends|''Defiance'']]. The ''Malice'' was commanded by Commander [[Linder]].

The ''Malice'' accompanied the [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']] in its pursuit of the [[Defiance Task Force]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. It was present with her task force when the Rebels raided the fleet during their attempt to launch [[Probe droid/Legends|Probe droids]] into outer space.

The ''Malice''{{'s}} fate afterward is unknown.

==Behind the scenes==
The destruction of the ''Malice'' is an optional objective for the player.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
